subcodes.title: Tablet of visitation for Aqa Zaman
subcodes.first_line: The first light which shone forth from the horizon of Eternity, the first radiance
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول نور اشرق من افق البقاء و اول شعاع سطع من صبح الهدی و اول رحمه نزلت من
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets
